description: You are a robotics engineer deploying a magnetic crawler to inspect offshore pipeline welds. The physical robot uses a block camera with a 10x optical zoom and precise auto-focus. The pan and tilt mechanisms have strict physical rotation limits to prevent internal cables from twisting and tearing. Upgrade the INSPECTION_CRAWLER robot's fixed camera to a PTZ system by configuring the pan_motor with a position range of -1.57 to 1.57 and the tilt_motor with a range of -0.78 to 0.78. Add a Zoom node to the ptz_camera with a maxFieldOfView of 0.87 and a minFieldOfView of 0.087. Additionally, add a Focus node to the camera with a minFocalDistance of 0.5 and a maxFocalDistance of 50.0. Save the modified world to /home/ga/Desktop/ptz_crawler_configured.wbt.
